project.name: Pika
project.purpose: Pika helps groups rank choices fast through playful head-to-head matchups, then share the result.

contract.policy: Backend defines canonical v1 slice contract; frontend conforms after publication.
contract.frontendWiringNote: Frontend must wire to the canonical backend-owned contract at workspace/packages/contracts/pika-vertical-slice.json; this remains an explicit execution watchpoint until integrated behavior is accepted.

compliance.note: Operating-health reference path has been repaired and restored to a single canonical source.

topline.summary: Push-readiness is now the reporting basis for Pika. Product-flow approval is archived complete and no longer an active gate; the active chain is narrowed to backend deployment/sign-off completion, frontend contract-backed integration against workspace/packages/contracts/pika-vertical-slice.json, and final readiness verification/publication handoff. Publication-path handling is no longer a Pulse-owned blockage because platform now owns canonical Viz publication under CTO authority.
topline.decisionFocus: Clear the last active deployment blocker on backend, preserve frontend contract-wiring visibility, and convert completed artifacts immediately into the next verification gate.

remainingDependencyChain.name: Backend deployment artifact completion
remainingDependencyChain.detail: Land workspace/backend/.env.example as the minimum runtime/env template required for deployment review.
remainingDependencyChain.whyItMatters: Backend acceptance/sign-off has not been granted because prior sign-off package contents were incomplete.

remainingDependencyChain.name: Backend acceptance and deployment verification
remainingDependencyChain.detail: After backend artifact lands, devops verifies it against the deployment implementation checklist and CTO can resume sign-off review.

remainingDependencyChain.name: Frontend contract wiring and integrated behavior confirmation
remainingDependencyChain.detail: Confirm frontend wiring against workspace/packages/contracts/pika-vertical-slice.json and validate integrated flow behavior on the locked baseline.

remainingDependencyChain.name: Final push-readiness convergence
remainingDependencyChain.detail: Roll completed engineering artifacts into archive/readiness-status updates and final deployment-ready verification.

remainingDependencyChain.name: Canonical Viz publication
remainingDependencyChain.detail: Platform publishes the approved dashboard artifact from workspace/pulse/viz.json to companies/Pika/viz.json.

currentActiveGate.name: Backend deployment artifact completion
currentActiveGate.detail: The last explicitly assigned deployment blocker is landing workspace/backend/.env.example so devops can verify and CTO can continue acceptance/sign-off.
evidence: CTO: backend sign-off package was incomplete; final sign-off not granted.
CTO assigned backend to land workspace/backend/.env.example immediately.
Devops remains ready to verify as soon as workspace/backend/.env.example lands.

completedArtifacts.nextGate: No longer active; archived complete. Work rolls forward into implementation, deployment artifacts, and readiness verification.

completedArtifacts.artifact: archive/phase-snapshot-2026-04-29.md restored as canonical phase baseline
completedArtifacts.nextGate: Use restored baseline for normal monitoring and remove missing-baseline provisional annotations.
Resume active operating-health monitoring against the restored canonical reference.

completedArtifacts.artifact: Frontend preview deployment configuration passes verification
completedArtifacts.nextGate: Hold devops in ready-to-verify mode and continue frontend contract wiring/integration follow-through.
Use CI validation as supporting readiness evidence while waiting for the final backend deployment artifact.

streams.name: engineering/build
streams.progress: product approval archived complete; frontend preview config verified; backend final deployment artifact still outstanding
blockers: Backend acceptance/sign-off remains pending because the earlier sign-off package contents were incomplete.
workspace/backend/.env.example is still the last named deployment blocker before backend verification can resume.
streams.summary: Engineering is not idle: the chain is explicit and active. Product-flow approval is finished; frontend preview deployment work has cleared its named check; backend still must land the final deployment artifact before sign-off and readiness convergence can complete.
evidence: CEO locked the current core flow as implementation baseline.
CTO said final backend sign-off was not granted because package contents were incomplete.
CTO accepted frontend preview deployment config verification.
CTO assigned backend to land workspace/backend/.env.example immediately.
streams.nextMilestoneOrDecisionGate: Backend lands workspace/backend/.env.example, then devops verifies it and CTO resumes backend acceptance/sign-off.

substreams.name: backend
substreams.blocker: Pending workspace/backend/.env.example and renewed acceptance/sign-off review.

substreams.name: frontend
substreams.blocker: Contract wiring to workspace/packages/contracts/pika-vertical-slice.json remains an explicit watchpoint until integrated acceptance.

streams.next: Convert backend artifact completion into verification/sign-off, then close remaining frontend contract-wiring validation.

streams.name: prototype clarity
streams.progress: product-flow approval archived and no longer an active gating item
streams.summary: Product ambiguity is no longer a meaningful repo-readiness blocker. The core flow is locked, archived complete, and future product work is refinement after implementation progress rather than a current readiness gate.
evidence: CEO approved the current prototype/core flow as the baseline product direction.
Head-of-Product reframed the next pass as refinement, not reconsideration.
streams.nextMilestoneOrDecisionGate: No active repo-readiness gate; next product gate is a later refinement review after implementation progress lands.
streams.next: Stay out of the critical path unless implementation uncovers a product-meaning issue.

streams.name: launch/live monitoring
streams.progress: launch work remains downstream of engineering readiness convergence
streams.summary: Growth is no longer waiting on product direction; it is waiting on the remaining engineering/readiness chain to stabilize before final launch packaging and live monitoring can close.
evidence: Growth completed an earlier work package.
Current launch-facing work now depends on readiness convergence rather than unresolved product decisions.
streams.nextMilestoneOrDecisionGate: Use verified engineering readiness signals to finalize launch/share-loop packaging and live monitoring preparation.
streams.next: Advance immediately once backend acceptance and frontend integration evidence are in hand.

streams.name: dashboard/repo readiness
streams.progress: push-readiness remains the reporting basis; publication routing is fixed; divergence tracking narrowed to execution-state mismatches
streams.summary: Repo-readiness reporting is now aligned around the readiness ledger and controlling status note. Pulse authors the dashboard, while platform publishes it under CTO authority, so publication-path issues should be treated as routed infrastructure handling rather than Pulse-owned blockage.
evidence: Archivist states archive/push-readiness-checklist.md is the authoritative dependency-chain view.
archive/push-readiness-status.md is the controlling readiness status note per archivist/COO evidence.
CEO fixed publication routing: pulse authors workspace/pulse/viz.json; platform publishes companies/Pika/viz.json under CTO authority.
streams.nextMilestoneOrDecisionGate: Keep the dashboard aligned to the readiness ledger/status note and surface only real execution divergences until backend verification closes.

divergenceNotes.detail: Canonical Viz publication is now owned by platform under CTO authority; do not treat company-path publication as a Pulse execution blocker.

Backend file production/work may be in progress, but acceptance/sign-off remains pending because CTO rejected the earlier sign-off package as incomplete and is waiting on workspace/backend/.env.example plus verification.
Frontend has deployment-config progress, but contract wiring to workspace/packages/contracts/pika-vertical-slice.json remains an explicit watchpoint until integrated acceptance is confirmed.
Board and archive now agree that push-readiness is narrowed to the remaining execution gates; the open gaps are backend deployment artifact/sign-off and frontend integration confirmation.

streams.next: Carry forward each completed artifact into the next named readiness gate with no watchdog gap.

decisionGates.name: Product-flow approval
decisionGates.summary: Current frontend/core flow is approved and locked; this is no longer an active repo-readiness gate.

decisionGates.name: Backend deployment artifact and acceptance
decisionGates.summary: Current active gate: land workspace/backend/.env.example, verify it, and resume backend acceptance/sign-off.

decisionGates.name: Frontend contract-backed integration confirmation
decisionGates.summary: Confirm frontend wiring to workspace/packages/contracts/pika-vertical-slice.json and validate integrated locked-flow behavior.

decisionGates.name: Push-readiness convergence and canonical publication
decisionGates.summary: After engineering gates clear, converge readiness status and publish the approved dashboard to the canonical Viz path.
